what_are_tokens.title: What are Tokens?
what_are_tokens.subtitle: Crypto Basics
what_are_tokens.description: Understand the basics of digital tokens and how they work.
what_are_tokens.content:
# What are Tokens?

## Introduction
Tokens are like digital vouchers that represent value. Think of them like mobile phone credit - you buy credit, use it, but it's not actual physical cash.

## Key Concepts

1.  **Digital Assets**: NT and CT are digital assets on a blockchain.
2.  **Reference Rates**:
    *   **1 NT** ≈ 1 Nigerian Naira
    *   **1 CT** ≈ 1 CFA Franc
    *   *Note*: These are designed to be easy to understand, but they are digital tokens, not government currency.

## Why use Tokens?
*   **Speed**: Send money instantly, 24/7.
*   **Cost**: Much lower fees than traditional banks.
*   **Global**: Works across borders without restrictions.

## 💡 Did You Know?
All transactions are secured by smart contracts on the blockchain, making them transparent and irreversible.

how_agents_work.title: How Agents Work
how_agents_work.subtitle: Deposits & Withdrawals
how_agents_work.description: Learn how to deposit and withdraw cash using local agents.
how_agents_work.content:
# How Agents Work

## Who are Agents?
Agents are independent partners verified by AfriExchange. They act as a bridge between your physical cash and your digital tokens.

## 📥 Depositing (Cash -> Tokens)
1.  **Find**: Locate a verified agent in the app.
2.  **Transfer**: Send them cash (Bank Transfer/Mobile Money).
3.  **Receive**: The agent mints tokens directly to your wallet.

## 📤 Withdrawing (Tokens -> Cash)
1.  **Sell**: Choose "Withdraw" and select an agent.
2.  **Escrow**: Your tokens are locked safely in escrow.
3.  **Receive**: The agent sends cash to your bank account.
4.  **Confirm**: Only release the tokens once you have the cash!

## 🛡️ The Escrow Protection
When you sell tokens, they aren't sent directly to the agent. They are held in **Escrow** (a safe middle ground). The agent only gets them *after* you confirm you received the money. This keeps you safe!

understanding_value.title: Understanding Value
understanding_value.subtitle: Economics 101
understanding_value.description: How token value is maintained and guaranteed.
understanding_value.content:
# Understanding Value

## Is this "Real" Money?
Tokens are **digital representations** of value. While they aren't physical notes, they hold real value within the AfriExchange ecosystem.

## The 1:1 Guarantee
We operate on a **Full Reserve** basis.
*   For every **1 NT** you hold, there is **1 Naira** held in our secure treasury.
*   For every **1 CT**, there is **1 CFA**.

## Transparency
We conduct regular audits to ensure our digital tokens always match our physical reserves. We do not lend out your money; it sits safely in the vault, backing the value of your tokens 100%.

## Market Rates
While the reference rate is 1:1, market forces (supply and demand) can cause slight variations when swapping between tokens, just like in a real market!

safety_security.title: Safety & Security
safety_security.subtitle: Best Practices
safety_security.description: Best practices to keep your account and funds safe.
safety_security.content:
# Safety & Security

## Protecting Your Account
Your security starts with you. Here are the golden rules:
1.  **Strong Password**: Use a unique, complex password.
2.  **2FA**: Enable Two-Factor Authentication in Settings.
3.  **Biometrics**: Use FaceID/TouchID for secure login.

## 🚫 Common Scams to Avoid
*   **"Support" asking for passwords**: Real support will NEVER ask for your password or PIN.
*   **Fake Websites**: Always check you are on the official app.
*   **Too Good To Be True**: Avoid offers promising to "double your money".

## Transaction Safety
*   **Verify Recipient**: Transactions are irreversible. Always double-check the email or wallet address.
*   **Escrow is King**: Never send tokens directly to an agent for a withdrawal without using the official "Withdraw" flow which uses Escrow.

## Lost Phone?
Don't panic! Your tokens are on the blockchain, not your phone. Log in from another device and freeze your account immediately.

learn_more.hero_subtitle: Agents are independent partners who help users exchange tokens (NT/CT) for local currency. You run your own small exchange business using the AfriX platform.
learn_more.do_bullet_1: Mint tokens when users buy with cash.
learn_more.do_bullet_2: Burn tokens when users sell for cash.
learn_more.do_bullet_3: Earn fees while the system protects users via escrow.
learn_more.works_body_deposit: You deposit USDT as a security bond. Your minting capacity equals your deposit in USDT. When you mint tokens, capacity goes down; when you burn tokens, capacity goes back up.
learn_more.works_example_deposit: Example: Deposit 1,000 USDT → you can mint/burn up to 1,000 USDT worth of tokens across users.
learn_more.works_body_escrow: For sells (burn), user tokens are locked in escrow until you send fiat and the system confirms. If there is a dispute and you don't deliver, your deposit can be slashed and the user refunded.
learn_more.step_desc_1: Choose your country, confirm your currency, and add a Polygon USDT withdrawal address.
learn_more.step_desc_2: Upload ID, selfie, and proof of address so the team can verify your identity.
learn_more.step_desc_3: Your documents are reviewed. Once approved, you can deposit USDT to activate.
learn_more.step_desc_4: Deposit at least the minimum USDT, get capacity, and start handling buy/sell requests from users.
learn_more.payments_intro: You receive and send fiat directly to users using local rails:
learn_more.payments_bullet_2: XOF countries (CT): bank or mobile money (Orange Money, Wave, Moov, etc.).
learn_more.payments_outro: Users see your bank or mobile money details when they choose you as their agent.
learn_more.resp_bullet_1: Verify every payment in your own bank/mobile money app before confirming.
learn_more.resp_bullet_2: Respond quickly (target under 15 minutes) to keep high ratings and more business.
learn_more.resp_bullet_3: Follow dispute rules – if you don't deliver, your deposit can be slashed.
learn_more.resp_outro: For full details, you'll see the Agent Handbook inside your agent dashboard after approval.

help.header_subtitle: Find answers and get help quickly.
help.intro_title: Find answers and get help quickly
help.intro_subtitle: Browse common questions, review safety guidance, and contact support when you need help with transactions, disputes, or account issues.
help.contact_body: For account issues, disputes, or questions about tokens and agents, our team is here to help.
help.contact_tip: Have your transaction ID, screenshots, and device details ready.

safety.do_1: Verify recipient and amount before sending.
safety.do_2: Confirm receipt only after cash is in your account.
safety.do_3: Keep your password secure and enable 2FA.
safety.dont_1: Share your password. Support never asks for it.
safety.dont_2: Fall for double-your-tokens or verify-by-sending scams.

what-is-afritoken.a: AfriToken is a peer-to-peer platform for exchanging digital tokens (NT and CT). Buy tokens from agents with Naira or XOF, send tokens to friends instantly, swap between token types, and sell tokens back to agents for cash.

what-are-nt-ct.q: What are NT and CT tokens?
what-are-nt-ct.a: NT (Naira Token) has a reference rate of 1 NT ≈ 1 Naira. CT (CFA Token) has 1 CT ≈ 1 XOF. They are blockchain-based digital assets rather than government-issued currency.

how-buy.q: How do I buy tokens from an agent?
how-buy.a: Tap Buy Tokens, choose token type and amount, pick an agent, send payment to the agent's bank or mobile money, then upload proof in the app. The agent confirms and mints tokens to your wallet.

escrow.a: When you sell, your tokens are locked in a smart contract. The agent cannot access them until you confirm you received cash. If the agent doesn't pay, you can dispute and your tokens are refunded.

faq_full.hero_title: Answers to the most important questions
faq_full.hero_subtitle: Explore account setup, token usage, agent transactions, security, fees, and dispute guidance in one place.
faq_full.cta_subtitle: If your answer isn't here, go back to Help & Support and use the Email Support option so we can assist with account or transaction issues.

what-is.a: A peer-to-peer platform for exchanging digital tokens (NT and CT). Buy from agents with Naira or XOF, send to friends, swap token types, and sell back to agents for cash.

is-bank.a: No. We're a technology platform connecting you with users and independent agents. We don't hold your money or provide banking services.

create-account.q: How do I create an account?
create-account.a: Download the app, enter email and password, verify your email. No bank account needed to start.

nt-ct.a: NT (Naira Token) ≈ 1 Naira reference. CT (CFA Token) ≈ 1 XOF reference. They are blockchain tokens, not government-issued currency.

pay-things.q: Can I use tokens to pay for things?
pay-things.a: Yes at merchants who accept AfriToken. At regular stores you need to sell tokens for cash first.

how-buy.q: How do I buy tokens from an agent?
how-buy.a: Tap Buy Tokens, choose amount and agent, send payment to the agent's bank or mobile money, upload proof. Agent confirms and mints tokens to your wallet, usually within 5 to 15 minutes.

choose-agent.q: How do I choose a good agent?
choose-agent.a: Look for a high rating, fast response time, and verified or high-liquidity badges. Avoid low ratings and very slow response times.

how-sell.q: How do I convert tokens back to cash?
how-sell.a: Tap Sell Tokens, choose amount and agent. Your tokens lock in escrow. The agent sends you cash, and you should only confirm after the money lands in your account.

escrow.a: Your tokens are locked in a smart contract. The agent cannot access them until you confirm receipt of cash. If they don't pay, you can dispute and get your tokens refunded.

dispute.q: What if the agent doesn't send me cash?
dispute.a: Open a dispute from the request status screen and upload proof. Admin review usually happens within 24 to 48 hours. If the agent didn't deliver, your tokens are refunded from escrow.

protect.q: How do I protect my account?
protect.a: Use a strong password, never share it, and enable 2FA in Settings > Security. Real support will never ask for your password or tell you to verify by sending tokens.

scams.a: Avoid support impersonators asking for passwords, double-your-tokens offers, fake websites and apps, and rates that look too good to be true. Never send tokens to prove ownership.

fees.a: P2P transfer is 0.5%, swap is 1.5%, receive is free, buy and sell with agents are included in the quoted rate, and merchant payments are paid by the merchant. All fees are shown before you confirm.

notification_inbox.empty_sub: You'll be notified here about transactions, agent activity, and important account updates.
notification_inbox.err_mark_read: Failed to mark notification as read
notification_inbox.err_mark_all: Failed to mark all as read

notifications.intro_subtitle: Choose what matters to you. We'll only send what you allow.
notifications.desc_transactions: Get notified about sends, receives, and swaps.
notifications.desc_agent: Updates on agent requests and approvals.
notifications.desc_security: Alerts for login attempts and account changes.
notifications.success_desc: Your notification preferences have been updated.
notifications.err_save: Failed to save preferences. Please try again.

security.intro_subtitle: Enable biometric login and two-factor authentication to add extra layers of protection to your account.
security.desc_biometrics: Use Face ID or Touch ID to sign in.
security.desc_2fa: Require a code from your authenticator app when signing in.
security.bio_expo_desc: Biometric login doesn't work in Expo Go. Build the app with: npx expo run:ios
security.bio_not_avail_desc: Biometric login is not available on this device. Set up Face ID or Touch ID in your device settings first.
security.bio_prompt: Verify identity to enable biometric login
security.bio_lockout_desc: Too many failed attempts. Use your device passcode to unlock, then try again.
security.bio_err_desc: Biometric authentication failed. Try again when your device biometrics are available.
security.bio_err_general: Biometric login could not be enabled on this device.
security.err_disable_failed_desc: Check your password and 6-digit code, then try again.
security.setup_2fa_subtitle: Scan the QR code or enter the key manually
security.step_1_text: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
security.step_2_text: Or enter this setup key manually in your authenticator app
security.step_3_text: Enter the 6-digit code shown in your authenticator app
security.disable_warning: Disabling 2FA reduces your account security. Only proceed if you intend to remove this protection.

index.header_subtitle: Select Naira or XOF token, set amount, and select an agent to finalize trade.
index.amount_helper: Enter the amount of {{tokenType}} you want the agent to deliver.

select_agent.header_subtitle: Choose a trusted agent to buy {{amount}} {{tokenType}}
select_agent.summary_title: Pick the best agent for this order
select_agent.summary_text: Compare agent speed, capacity, and ratings before continuing to payment instructions.
select_agent.empty_desc: Please try again later or contact support

payment_instructions.alert_self_select_desc: As an agent, you cannot buy tokens from yourself. Please select a different agent to complete this transaction.
payment_instructions.alert_create_err: Failed to create request. Please try again.
payment_instructions.header_subtitle: Send payment to the selected agent and keep your payment receipt.
payment_instructions.timeline_step_1_desc: Send local currency to the agent's account details below.
payment_instructions.timeline_step_2_desc: Capture transaction receipt as official payment proof.
payment_instructions.timeline_step_3_desc: Confirm transfer and upload image to lock escrow.
payment_instructions.warning_desc: Only click proceed after making the payment. Submission of fake payment receipts will lead to immediate ban.

upload_proof.perm_camera_desc: Camera access is needed to take photos of payment proof
upload_proof.perm_gallery_desc: Photo library access is needed to select payment proof
upload_proof.err_no_image: Please select or take a photo first
upload_proof.err_upload_failed: Failed to upload proof. Please try again.
upload_proof.alert_success_desc: Payment proof uploaded! Agent will review shortly.
upload_proof.alert_cancel_desc: Are you sure you want to cancel this mint request? This action cannot be undone.
upload_proof.alert_cancelled_desc: Your mint request has been cancelled successfully.
upload_proof.header_subtitle: Share your payment receipt so the agent can verify your transfer.
upload_proof.step_hint: Step 3 of 3 — Submit receipt for verification
upload_proof.warning_desc: Fraudulent receipts result in immediate and permanent account suspension.

status.header_subtitle: Track progress and take action when needed.
status.proof_hint: Your uploaded receipt — the agent will verify this image.
status.msg_action_required_desc: Please upload your payment proof so the agent can confirm your transfer.
status.msg_review_desc: The agent is verifying your payment. You'll be notified once complete.
status.msg_success_desc: {{amount}} {{tokenType}} tokens are now in your wallet.
status.msg_failed_rejected_disputed_resolved: This request was closed after dispute review. Contact support if you need further help.
status.msg_failed_rejected_default: Your payment proof was rejected. If you have concerns, you can open a dispute.
status.msg_failed_default: This transaction was not completed in time or was manually cancelled.
status.msg_disputed_desc: Our support team is investigating. We'll reach out to you via email soon.
status.modal_dispute_reason_err: Please provide a reason for the dispute
status.modal_dispute_success_desc: Our support team will review it shortly.
status.modal_dispute_desc: Explain why you believe your payment proof was wrongly rejected. Our support team will investigate.
status.modal_dispute_placeholder_reason: e.g., I have valid payment proof

rate_agent.err_unavailable: This transaction can no longer be rated.
rate_agent.alert_already_rated_desc: You've already submitted a review for this transaction.
rate_agent.summary_text: Your feedback helps other users choose better agents and helps us maintain a more trusted marketplace.
rate_agent.rating_subtitle: Tap a star to score the agent based on speed, communication, and overall reliability.
rate_agent.comment_subtitle: Share anything helpful about the transaction. This is optional.
rate_agent.comment_placeholder: Tell us more about your experience...
rate_agent.tip_text: Keep feedback specific and respectful so it stays useful for the community.

index.header_subtitle: Share your credentials to receive payments.
index.method_desc: Senders can scan your QR code or enter your registered account email to transfer tokens directly to your wallet.
index.tip_desc: Show this QR code to the sender. Senders can also complete transfers using your AfriExchange account email.

index.header_subtitle: Transfer tokens instantly to any AfriToken user.
index.intro_desc: Select the token type to transfer, specify the recipient's registered email address or scan their QR code.
index.err_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
index.input_hint: Type the recipient's AfriToken account email address.
index.tip_desc: Double check the recipient's email address. Transfers are processed instantly and cannot be reversed.

scan_qr.err_invalid_qr: This QR code is not from AfriToken. Please scan a valid AfriToken receive QR code.
scan_qr.err_missing_email: QR code does not contain recipient email.
scan_qr.err_parse_failed: Could not read QR code. Please try again or enter email manually.
scan_qr.denied_desc: Please enable camera access in your device settings to scan QR codes.

amount.header_subtitle: Specify how many tokens you want to send.
amount.err_insufficient_funds: Insufficient funds. You need an additional {{additional}} {{tokenType}} to complete this.
amount.placeholder_message: Add a message for the recipient... (Optional)

confirm.intro_desc: Review details of the recipient and amounts carefully before executing this transaction.
confirm.security_desc: This transaction is signed, encrypted, and settled instantly on-chain. It cannot be reversed once broadcasted.

success.title: Transfer Successful!
success.subtitle: Your tokens have been transferred successfully.
success.info_desc: The recipient will receive a notification about this transfer immediately.

index.header_subtitle: Instant conversion between your token types.
index.intro_desc: Select the token to send and one to receive, enter the amount, review the live rate and confirm your swap.
index.info_desc: Your swap is processed instantly at the current market rate. No delays or hidden fees.

confirm.intro_desc: Verify the tokens, amounts, and exchange rate below before submitting this instant conversion.
confirm.rate_lock_desc: The exchange rate shown is locked for this transaction and won't change once confirmed.

success.title: Swap Successful!
success.subtitle: Your tokens have been converted and your wallet is updated.
success.banner_subtitle: The received amount is now reflected in your wallet.
success.info_desc: Your wallet balances have been updated to reflect this swap.

request_tokens.header_subtitle: A smarter way to ask for tokens is on its way.
request_tokens.hero_title: A better way to ask for tokens is coming
request_tokens.hero_subtitle: We are redesigning this flow to feel more polished, easier to track, and more trustworthy for both sender and recipient.
request_tokens.status_desc: This screen is next in the upgrade queue and will follow the same premium direction as Buy, Sell, Send, Receive, and Swap.
request_tokens.feature_desc_1: Create token requests for friends, customers, or teammates in a few taps — no account needed on their side.
request_tokens.feature_desc_2: Set the token type, amount, and a clear reason so recipients know exactly what to pay and why.
request_tokens.feature_desc_3: See when requests are pending, viewed, paid, or overdue — all from one clean live timeline.
request_tokens.step_desc_1: Select token, amount, and recipient details with a cleaner, guided form.
request_tokens.step_desc_2: Recipients get a clear prompt with full context — no guessing what the request is for.
request_tokens.step_desc_3: Monitor pending and completed requests without chasing updates manually.
request_tokens.benefit_item_1: Faster collection flow without back-and-forth messages
request_tokens.benefit_item_2: Clear status visibility for every outstanding request
request_tokens.benefit_item_3: Instant confirmation when a request is fulfilled
